progress_summary: Sixth bug-check run on this project. Diff is /skills/[id].astro (data-cmd color → --workflow, TOC link padding for target-size) and /architecture.astro (band-label-text + legend-section-label → --subtle, three card spans + spine swatch teal → calibrated #14B8A6). All CSS / inline-style changes, no JS/TS logic, no API surface. Ran: vitest (108/108 passed; one transient flake on first run cleared on re-run), astro check (0 errors, 0 warnings — pre-existing 'ortho' hint at architecture.astro:1010 unchanged), site build (25 pages, 6.55s, clean), anti-pattern grep on diff (clean), secret scan (no matches). Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: Source-touching commit — ran the full applicable check suite (tests, build, type-check, anti-patterns, secrets).
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; relying on astro check and tsc-via-astro for type/lint signal.
npm audit skipped because the diff doesn't change package.json or lockfiles.

next_actions: If a future commit changes package.json or package-lock.json, run npm audit --audit-level=critical as part of bug-check.
If eslint config is added to the repo, wire it into bug-check's lint step.
